allow: Bash(curl -sL -o /dev/null -w "Final URL: %{url_effective}\\nHTTP Status: %{http_code}\\nTime to first byte: %{time_starttransfer}s\\nTotal time: %{time_total}s\\n" http://group-2-alb-1333830676.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com/ --max-time 15)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP Status: %{http_code}\\nRedirect URL: %{redirect_url}\\nTime to connect: %{time_connect}s\\nTime to first byte: %{time_starttransfer}s\\nTotal time: %{time_total}s\\n" http://group-2-alb-1333830676.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com/ --max-time 15)

Bash(curl -sk -o /dev/null -w "HTTP Status: %{http_code}\\nFinal URL: %{url_effective}\\nTime to first byte: %{time_starttransfer}s\\nTotal time: %{time_total}s\\n" https://group-2-alb-1333830676.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com/ --max-time 15)
